name: State Factor Sets and Structures
description: Definition of state factor sets SFZ, state factor structure FSZ, component next state functions NjZ, and component state trajectories STjZ.

elements.text: The set of factor sets of the state set of the system Z is SFZ: {S1Z, ..., SnZ} if SZ is a product, or {SZ} otherwise.
The state factor set structure FSZ is {(S1Z, S1), ..., (SnZ, Sn)} if SZ is a product, or {(SZ, SZ)} otherwise.
NjZ = PJNj ∘ NZ is the jth component of the next state function.
STjZ(f, x) = PJNj ∘ STZ(f, x) is the jth component of the state trajectory.
